heading: Applicability of requirements under programs for covered housing assistance
label: 1437bbb–3 Applicability of requirements under programs for covered housing assistance

children.text: the Secretary may waive any such term or condition identified by the jurisdiction to the extent that the Secretary determines such action to be appropriate to carry out the purposes of the demonstration program under this subchapter; and
the participating jurisdiction may combine the amounts made available and use the amounts for any activity eligible under the programs under sections 1437f and 1437g of this title.

children.heading: Number of families assisted
children.label: b Number of families assisted
children.text: In carrying out the demonstration program under this subchapter, each participating jurisdiction shall assist substantially the same total number of eligible low-income families as would have otherwise been served by the public housing agency for the jurisdiction had the jurisdiction not participated in the demonstration program under this subchapter.

children.heading: Protection of recipients
children.label: c Protection of recipients
children.text: This subchapter may not be construed to authorize the termination of assistance to any recipient receiving assistance under this chapter before , as a result of the implementation of the demonstration program under this subchapter.October 21, 1998

children.heading: Effect on ability to compete for other programs
children.label: d Effect on ability to compete for other programs
children.text: This subchapter may not be construed to affect the ability of any applying or participating jurisdiction (or a public housing agency for any such jurisdiction) to compete or otherwise apply for or receive assistance under any other housing assistance program administered by the Secretary.
